33 Capital Projects Funds - Other
34 Capital Projects Fund - 30000
35 Maintenance and Operations Purpose
36 For services and expenses of a quality program for adult care facili-
37 ties. Such program shall be targeted at facilities with a high
38 population of residents who receive supplemental security income, as
39 defined in subchapter XVI of chapter 7 of title 42 of the United
40 States Code, state supplemental payments, Medicaid (with respect to
41 residents in an assisted living program), or safety net assistance,
42 as defined in section 159 of the social services law, and used to
43 support capital improvement projects that will enhance the physical
44 environment of the facility and promote a higher quality of life for
45 residents, in accordance with a plan approved by the residents'
46 council, the department, and the director of the budget, provided
47 however that such expenditures shall not be used to supplant the
48 obligations of facility operator to provide a safe comfortable

455 12554-09-5
